title: pouteria gardneri
intro: Pouteria gardneri, also known as the camalote or the wild plum, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pouteria gardneri include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting digestive health. The plant's leaves and bark can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
